articles.title_en: Power outage reported in Sevastopol as Russia downs 323 Ukrainian drones overnight
articles.lead_en: Two civilians were killed each in a Ukrainian drone attack on Gorlovka in the Donetsk People’s Republic and on the Nizhny Novgorod Region
articles.title_raw: Power outage reported in Sevastopol as Russia downs 323 Ukrainian drones overnight
articles.lead_raw: Two civilians were killed each in a Ukrainian drone attack on Gorlovka in the Donetsk People’s Republic and on the Nizhny Novgorod Region

articles.title_en: One killed, 6 others injured in Ukrainian attacks on Russia’s Belgorod Region in past day
articles.lead_en: Acting Governor Alexander Shuvayev said that Ukrainian troops attacked the Belgorod Region 75 times over the past 24 hours
articles.title_raw: One killed, 6 others injured in Ukrainian attacks on Russia’s Belgorod Region in past day
articles.lead_raw: Acting Governor Alexander Shuvayev said that Ukrainian troops attacked the Belgorod Region 75 times over the past 24 hours

articles.title_en: Massive storm and tornado damage nearly 100 homes in Russia, injuring 16
articles.lead_en: A storm tore through the Sverdlovsk region on the evening of June 22, damaging homes and power line poles. Kushva was hit hardest; the city has since been placed under a state of emergency.
